LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DONNA MORI'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY SUBMITS NO EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF HER MOTION AND THEREFORE HAS NOT ESTABLISHED A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS OR THAT THE BALANCE OF HARMS WEIGHS IN HER FAVOR. RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DONNA MORI'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is Denied. Moving party submits no evidence in support of her motion and therefore has not established a likelihood of success on the merits or that the balance of harms weighs in her favor. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg
